humanizer-ru
Copyright (c) 2026 Sergey Starikov

This project is a Russian-language adaptation inspired by:

  humanizer
  Copyright (c) 2024-2026 blader
  Licensed under the MIT License
  https://github.com/blader/humanizer

Approximately 8-10 of the original 29 pattern categories were adapted
with modifications for Russian-language specifics. The remaining
~28-30 pattern categories are original to this project and address
issues unique to Russian (nominalization, genitive-case chains,
"являться" parasite word, calques from English, Russian typography,
formal "Вы" by default, etc.).

The methodology (pattern catalog + before/after examples + two-pass
audit) is inherited from the original project.
